meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Natural Impact Set
meta.description: 300 unique customer-editable S-Coin review helper templates: 150 earn comments and 150 redeem comments. Written in natural Malaysian Malay/Manglish style while keeping required placeholders compatible with the existing Review Helper HTML.
meta.recommended_use: Use only as a starting point for real customers to edit based on their actual shopping and S-Coin experience.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Earn comments mention item, price, S-Coin cashback percent, and net S-Coin value.
Redeem comments mention item, S-Coin used, and redemption value.
Avoid adding RM before {price}, {netValue}, or {value} in the app if those values are already formatted with RM.
Designed for the existing Review Helper app structure.
